name: 13.2 fl oz Glass Bower Short Tumbler Gray - Threshold™
description: Enhance your cocktail or mocktail experience with this Glass Bower Short Tumbler from Threshold™. Made of glass, this tumbler is designed in a gray color for a classic look. The 13.2 fluid--ounce tumbler is great for serving a range of cold beverages and can be tossed in the dishwasher after use for quick and easy cleaning.                                                                                                        Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
